---
title: "Jiayi Liu"
about:
  template: jolla
  image: profile.jpg
  links:
    - icon: twitter
      text: twitter
      href: https://twitter.com/jliumaggie
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/jiayi-liu-econ
    - icon: email
      text: Email
      href: mailto:jiayi_liu@brown.edu
    # - icon: google
    #   text: Google Scholar
    #   href: https://scholar.google.com
---

Hi! I am a first-year Ph.D. student in Economics at Brown University.

My primary research interest lies at the intersection of applied microeconomics and behavioral economics, with a focus on topics in violence, healthcare, and media. My research is very topic-driven.

Please feel free to get in touch!
